tutor_section.pool_of_tutors: Pool of 100s of Tutors to choose from

privacy.title: Privacy Policy - Tuitional Education
privacy.description: Privacy policy for Tuitional Education platform.
privacy.heading: Privacy Policy for Tuitional Education
privacy.intro: Tuitional Education ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, and safeguard the information you provide to us when you use our services. This document is specifically designed to comply with Google OAuth consent screen requirements.
privacy.personal_desc: When you use our platform, we may collect the following personal information:
privacy.name: Name
privacy.google_account: Google account information (accessed via Google OAuth, as authorized by you).
privacy.usage_desc: We collect analytics related to the scheduling and usage of class meeting links, including:
privacy.class_links: Class Meeting Links: We use Google Meet integration to automatically create class meeting links for teachers and students.
privacy.data_analytics: Data Analytics: Meeting analytics (such as attendance and duration) are stored in our database to provide insights and improve the learning experience.
privacy.communication: Communication: To send important updates, notifications, or reminders related to your classes.
privacy.sharing_desc: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. However, we may share your information in the following cases:
privacy.service_providers: Service Providers: Third-party tools and services (such as Google Meet) used to facilitate our operations.
privacy.legal_requirements: Legal Requirements: When required by law or to comply with legal processes.
privacy.security_desc: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your information, including:
privacy.consent_desc: By using our services and authorizing Google OAuth, you consent to the collection and use of your information as outlined in this Privacy Policy.
privacy.rights_desc: You have the following rights regarding your data:
privacy.access: Access: Request a copy of your personal data.
privacy.correction: Correction: Request corrections to inaccuracies in your data.
privacy.deletion: Deletion: Request deletion of your data, subject to legal or operational requirements.
privacy.exercise_rights: To exercise these rights, contact us at:
privacy.third_party_desc: Our integration with Google Meet is subject to Google's privacy policy. We recommend reviewing Google's policies to understand how they handle your information.
privacy.changes_desc: We reserve the right to update this Privacy Policy at any time. You will be notified of changes through our platform or via email. Continued use of our services after any changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Privacy Policy.
privacy.contact_desc: If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:

terms.title: Terms of Service - Tuitional Education
terms.heading: Terms of Service for Tuitional Education
terms.intro: Welcome to Tuitional Education ("we" or "our platform"). By using our services, you agree to comply with the following Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, please do not use our services.
terms.use_services_desc: Our services, including integration with Google Meet for creating class meeting links, are intended for educational purposes only. You agree to use our platform responsibly and in accordance with all applicable laws and regulations.
terms.account_confidentiality: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and ensuring the security of your account.
terms.notify_unauthorized: You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account or security breach.
terms.prohibited_desc: When using our services, you agree not to:
terms.disrupt_platform: Engage in any activity that disrupts or interferes with our platform's functionality.
terms.misuse_services: Misuse our services for unauthorized purposes, including but not limited to spamming, hacking, or distributing harmful content.
terms.infringe_ip: Infringe upon the intellectual property rights of others.
terms.ip_desc: All content, trademarks, logos, and intellectual property associated with Tuitional Education are owned by Tuitional Education or its licensors. You may not use, reproduce, or distribute our content without prior written consent.
terms.modifications_desc: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any aspect of our services at any time without prior notice. We are not liable for any inconvenience or loss resulting from such changes.
terms.liability_desc: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Tuitional Education is not liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of our services.
terms.termination_desc: We reserve the right to terminate or suspend your account at our sole discretion if you violate these Terms or engage in activities harmful to our platform or users.
terms.governing_desc: These Terms are governed by the laws of [Insert Jurisdiction]. Any disputes arising from these Terms will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in [Insert Jurisdiction].
terms.changes_desc: We may update these Terms from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes through our platform or via email. Continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.
terms.contact_desc: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us:

top_talent.heading: Join Our Top Talent Team
top_talent.description_old: We're looking for exceptional individuals who share our passion for education and innovation.
top_talent.description:
Tuitional helps individuals transform their experiences and knowledge into incredible products enabling them to thrive businesses. We believe shared knowledge has the power to change lives, and by enabling people to share what they know we can definitely create a better world together that is more creative and knowledgeable.
We’re on a mission to empower creators to transform their
knowledge and learning into income. We’re looking for talented individuals having diverse interests to help strengthen what we already do.

hero.description: Providing high-quality innovative and improved teaching solutions to help students attain academic growth and excellence through individual online tutoring.

about_us.heading: About Us
about_us.description_p1: Tuitional is a premier online tutoring platform that elevates students' learning and provides an exceptional educational experience across the Gulf region. Licensed and registered by the Sharjah Research and Technology Park in 2022, Tuitional was founded with a visionary goal led by Ahmed Shaheer, Mirza Sinan Baig, Abdul Wahid Sheikh, Sheikh Zeeshan Ahmed, and Juliana Nogueria. Together, they aspired to create a state-of-the-art online tutoring service focused on delivering personalized, high-quality education tailored to individual students' needs.
about_us.description_p2: With a qualified team of expert tutors excelling in a wide range of subjects, Tuitional provides customized learning experiences through high-quality, personalized online tutoring sessions that cater to each student's unique learning needs and academic goals. Tuitional is known for its commitment to innovation, excellence, and quality education, empowering students to reach their highest potential. Through unwavering academic support, interactive and engaging lessons, and a solid educational foundation, we help students achieve both academic and future professional success.

mission.title: Inspiring Learning Journeys
mission.paragraph: Tuitional aims to provide students across the Gulf with high quality education empowering their futures through innovative teaching techniques, quality and easily accessible customized online education that elevates a student's confidence and academic growth. Our mission is to provide an inclusive and interactive academic environment that enables students to explore, thrive and excel in their studies.

points.title: Academic Guidance
points.description: Creating a solid platform for students to avail expert academic guidance.

points.title: Academic Excellence
points.description: Ensuring high standards and success for every student.

points.title: Accessible Quality Education
points.description: Providing easy accessible quality education for students in the Gulf.

points.title: Engaging Learning
points.description: Making challenging subjects enjoyable and interesting to learn.

points.title: Professional Growth
points.description: Enhancing professional growth and learning capabilities of students

points.title: Flexible and Customized Tutoring
points.description: Setting new standards in flexible and customized online tutoring.

value.title: Empowering Personalized Learning
value.paragraph: Tuitional deeply understands the importance of personalized, one-on-one learning in fostering academic excellence, confidence, and a lifelong passion for knowledge. Our highly skilled team of expert online tutors, representing diverse backgrounds from around the world, is dedicated to inspiring each student's love for learning through collaborative, inclusive, engaging, and individualized tutoring sessions. While academic empowerment remains Tuitional's top priority, we are equally committed to helping students grow into confident, compassionate, and well-rounded individuals.

points.title: Data-Privacy
points.description: Maintaining strict data privacy of each student and staff member.

points.title: Tutor Matching
points.description: Connecting the ideal online tutors with students based on their academic requirements.

points.title: Comprehensive Curriculum Support
points.description: Ensuring complete syllabus coverage in addition to easier subject comprehension.

points.title: Academic Growth
points.description: Supporting students in achieving their desired examination results and academic growth.

points.title: Expanding Educational Horizons
points.description: Improving and increasing a student's educational horizon for future successes.

points.title: Unwavering Academic Support
points.description: Providing unwavering academic support through customized individual online tutoring sessions.

items.heading: Experienced Tutors
items.dec: We have an experienced, qualified and expert team of online tutors that excel in a wide range of subjects. Tutors from all around the world help students in learning their required subjects in their preferred languages while excelling in their required subject learnings.

items.heading: One-on-One Learning
items.dec: Personalized one-on-one online tutoring sessions assist students in coping with their subject difficulties according to their individual learning needs, requirements and preferences. Our tutors aim to provide customized learning sessions to cater to each student's academic requirements.

items.heading: Flexible Schedules
items.dec: From a wide range of flexible schedules students can select their preferred timings and days to suit their busy schedules. Flexible schedules are a great way to help students learn and educate themselves in the best possible ways.
